policy.rule: Mutation cũ sai target/no-op → giữ immutable → gắn INVALID_MUTATION_ORACLE → tạo mutation-v2 → replacement vẫn kiểm tra cùng semantic requirement
policy.forbidden: Thay mutation về CAGR bằng mutation về shares; đổi semantic target mà giữ cùng mutation_id

drifted_slots_in_phase_4R.original_semantic_target: margin numerator changed to operating income
drifted_slots_in_phase_4R.remediation: Restore mutation to operating-income numerator substitution; engine must detect via DUPONT_INCONSISTENT (NPM recomputed from mutated numerator must disagree with canonical NPM used by DuPont chain).
drifted_slots_in_phase_4R.phase_4R2_target: operating_income substituted as NPAT in NPM computation

drifted_slots_in_phase_4R.remediation: Restore mutation to period-distance corruption: change number of periods between first and last without changing values. Engine must detect via CAGR_PERIOD_INVALID.
drifted_slots_in_phase_4R.phase_4R2_target: CAGR period distance corrupted (year count mismatch)

drifted_slots_in_phase_4R.phase_4R_drifted_target: equity inflated to trigger BVPS sanity
drifted_slots_in_phase_4R.remediation: Restore mutation to genuine missing→zero substitution: a metric with None value is silently replaced by 0.0 in the normalized input. Engine must detect via MISSING_REPLACED_WITH_ZERO (None in raw → 0.0 in normalized is a hard error, not a plausibility guess).
drifted_slots_in_phase_4R.phase_4R2_target: None value in raw input replaced by 0.0 in normalized input

drifted_slots_in_phase_4R.remediation: Restore mutation to genuine near-zero denominator: denominator value is small-but-positive (e.g. 0.5 tỷ VND equity). Engine must emit EXTREME_DENOMINATOR_WARNING as a structured warning (not hard-fail). Removing the warning from output is the corruption.
drifted_slots_in_phase_4R.phase_4R2_target: denominator near-zero (0.5), warning stripped from output

phase_4R2_replacement_protocol.INVALID_MUTATION_ORACLE_tagged: phase_4R versions of MUT-015/017/018/022 (tagged in lineage, not reused)
phase_4R2_replacement_protocol.note: No INVALID_MUTATION_ORACLE needed because original targets were always valid; the drift was in Phase 4R's mutation DEFINITIONS, not in the oracles themselves. Phase 4R2 restores the original definitions.
